baseline_control_summary: Source audit controls required HTTP 200, text/html content, expected Download data title, current Air Quality Download Service link and EEA copyright notice link.
claim_boundary: This source-audit record verifies that the EEA Air Quality Portal download page is reachable and exposes expected download-service and rights links. It does not download datasets, verify dataset coverage, or make a legal conclusion.

No pollutant, station or time coverage claim is made.
Rights evidence is limited to finding the EEA copyright notice link; no legal conclusion is made.
